changeSet.author: wizard
changeSet.comment: Seed 18 D&D 5e proficiency skills. Governing stat IDs reference stat_types by name.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO proficiency_skills (id, name, governing_stat_id) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), v.name, st.id FROM (VALUES ('Athletics', 'Strength'), ('Acrobatics', 'Dexterity'), ('Sleight of Hand', 'Dexterity'), ('Stealth', 'Dexterity'), ('Arcana', 'Intelligence'), ('History', 'Intelligence'), ('Investigation', 'Intelligence'), ('Nature', 'Intelligence'), ('Religion', 'Intelligence'), ('Animal Handling', 'Wisdom'), ('Insight', 'Wisdom'), ('Medicine', 'Wisdom'), ('Perception', 'Wisdom'), ('Survival', 'Wisdom'), ('Deception', 'Charisma'), ('Intimidation', 'Charisma'), ('Performance', 'Charisma'), ('Persuasion', 'Charisma') ) AS v(name, stat_name) JOIN stat_types st ON st.name = v.stat_name WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM proficiency_skills ps WHERE ps.name = v.name);

changeSet.author: wizard
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO backgrounds (id, name, description, skill_proficiency_ids_json, granted_extras) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), v.name, v.description, v.skills_json, v.extras FROM (VALUES ('Acolyte', 'You have spent your life in the service of a temple.', '["Insight","Religion"]', 'Two languages of your choice'), ('Criminal', 'You have a history of breaking the law.', '["Deception","Stealth"]', 'Thieves'' tools, one type of gaming set'), ('Folk Hero', 'You come from a humble social rank.', '["Animal Handling","Survival"]', 'One type of artisan''s tools, vehicles (land)'), ('Noble', 'You come from a family of wealth, power, and privilege.', '["History","Persuasion"]', 'One type of gaming set, one language'), ('Sage', 'You spent years learning the lore of the multiverse.', '["Arcana","History"]', 'Two languages of your choice'), ('Soldier', 'You have been a soldier in an army.', '["Athletics","Intimidation"]', 'One type of gaming set, vehicles (land)'), ('Charlatan', 'You have always had a way with people.', '["Deception","Sleight of Hand"]', 'Disguise kit, forgery kit'), ('Entertainer', 'You thrive in front of an audience.', '["Acrobatics","Performance"]', 'Disguise kit, one musical instrument'), ('Guild Artisan', 'You are a member of an artisan''s guild.', '["Insight","Persuasion"]', 'One type of artisan''s tools, one language'), ('Hermit', 'You lived in seclusion for a formative part of your life.', '["Medicine","Religion"]', 'Herbalism kit, one language'), ('Outlander', 'You grew up in the wilds, far from civilization.', '["Athletics","Survival"]', 'One musical instrument, one language'), ('Sailor', 'You sailed on a seagoing vessel for years.', '["Athletics","Perception"]', 'Navigator''s tools, vehicles (water)'), ('Urchin', 'You grew up on the streets alone, poor, and orphaned.', '["Sleight of Hand","Stealth"]', 'Disguise kit, thieves'' tools') ) AS v(name, description, skills_json, extras) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM backgrounds b WHERE b.name = v.name);

changeSet.author: wizard
changeSet.comment: Update existing SRD classes with 5e metadata. Uses stat_types by name.

changeSet.author: wizard
changeSet.sql:
-- Helper: build class-ids JSON from class names -- Cantrips (level 0) INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, available_to_class_ids_json) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), v.name, v.lvl, v.school, v.description, (SELECT '["' || string_agg(cc.id::text, '","') || '"]' FROM character_classes cc WHERE cc.name = ANY(v.classes)) FROM (VALUES ('Fire Bolt', 0, 'Evocation', 'A beam of fire streaks toward a creature. Ranged spell attack, 1d10 fire damage.', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Sacred Flame', 0, 'Evocation', 'Flame-like radiance descends. DEX save or 1d8 radiant damage.', ARRAY['Cleric']), ('Eldritch Blast', 0, 'Evocation', 'A beam of crackling energy. Ranged spell attack, 1d10 force damage.', ARRAY['Warlock']), ('Mage Hand', 0, 'Conjuration', 'A spectral floating hand appears and can manipulate objects.', ARRAY['Bard','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Light', 0, 'Evocation', 'An object you touch sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius.', ARRAY['Bard','Cleric','Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Minor Illusion', 0, 'Illusion', 'You create a sound or an image of an object.', ARRAY['Bard','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Prestidigitation',0, 'Transmutation', 'A minor magical trick. Sensory effects, cleaning, lighting, etc.', ARRAY['Bard','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Ray of Frost', 0, 'Evocation', 'A frigid beam streaks toward a creature. 1d8 cold damage, speed -10 ft.', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Thaumaturgy', 0, 'Transmutation', 'You manifest a minor wonder within range.', ARRAY['Cleric']), ('Druidcraft', 0, 'Transmutation', 'You create a tiny harmless sensory effect or other nature trick.', ARRAY['Druid']), ('Vicious Mockery', 0, 'Enchantment', 'Verbal barbs. WIS save or 1d4 psychic damage and disadvantage.', ARRAY['Bard']), ('Guidance', 0, 'Divination', 'The target can add 1d4 to one ability check.', ARRAY['Cleric','Druid']), ('Resistance', 0, 'Abjuration', 'The target can add 1d4 to one saving throw.', ARRAY['Cleric','Druid']), ('Spare the Dying', 0, 'Necromancy', 'A creature with 0 HP becomes stable.', ARRAY['Cleric']), ('Chill Touch', 0, 'Necromancy', 'A ghostly hand deals 1d8 necrotic damage and prevents healing.', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Poison Spray', 0, 'Conjuration', 'CON save or 1d12 poison damage.', ARRAY['Druid','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Produce Flame', 0, 'Conjuration', 'A flickering flame appears in your hand, 1d8 fire damage.', ARRAY['Druid']), ('Shillelagh', 0, 'Transmutation', 'Club or quarterstaff uses spellcasting ability, 1d8 damage.', ARRAY['Druid']), ('Blade Ward', 0, 'Abjuration', 'Resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, slashing until next turn.', ARRAY['Bard','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('True Strike', 0, 'Divination', 'Advantage on next attack roll against target.', ARRAY['Bard','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']),
-- Level 1 spells ('Magic Missile', 1, 'Evocation', 'Three darts of force, each dealing 1d4+1 force damage.', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Shield', 1, 'Abjuration', '+5 to AC until the start of your next turn. Reaction.', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Cure Wounds', 1, 'Evocation', 'A creature you touch regains 1d8 + spellcasting mod HP.', ARRAY['Bard','Cleric','Druid','Paladin','Ranger']), ('Healing Word', 1, 'Evocation', 'Bonus action. Creature within 60 ft regains 1d4 + mod HP.', ARRAY['Bard','Cleric','Druid']), ('Bless', 1, 'Enchantment', 'Up to 3 creatures add 1d4 to attack rolls and saving throws.', ARRAY['Cleric','Paladin']), ('Thunderwave', 1, 'Evocation', 'Wave of force. 2d8 thunder damage, pushed 10 ft.', ARRAY['Bard','Druid','Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Detect Magic', 1, 'Divination', 'Sense magic within 30 ft for 10 minutes.', ARRAY['Bard','Cleric','Druid','Paladin','Ranger','Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Mage Armor', 1, 'Abjuration', 'Base AC becomes 13 + DEX mod for 8 hours.', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Sleep', 1, 'Enchantment', '5d8 HP of creatures fall unconscious.', ARRAY['Bard','Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Faerie Fire', 1, 'Evocation', 'Objects and creatures outlined in light. Advantage on attacks.', ARRAY['Bard','Druid']), ('Guiding Bolt', 1, 'Evocation', 'Ranged spell attack 4d6 radiant, next attack has advantage.', ARRAY['Cleric']), ('Hex', 1, 'Enchantment', 'Bonus 1d6 necrotic on hits, disadvantage on one ability.', ARRAY['Warlock']), ('Hunter''s Mark', 1, 'Divination', 'Bonus 1d6 damage, advantage on tracking.', ARRAY['Ranger']), ('Burning Hands', 1, 'Evocation', '15-ft cone. 3d6 fire damage, DEX save for half.', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Charm Person', 1, 'Enchantment', 'Humanoid charmed on failed WIS save.', ARRAY['Bard','Druid','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Entangle', 1, 'Conjuration', 'Grasping weeds restrain creatures in 20-ft square.', ARRAY['Druid']), ('Inflict Wounds', 1, 'Necromancy', 'Melee spell attack. 3d10 necrotic damage.', ARRAY['Cleric']), ('Witch Bolt', 1, 'Evocation', 'Ranged spell attack 1d12 lightning, sustained.', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Command', 1, 'Enchantment', 'Speak one-word command. WIS save or obey.', ARRAY['Cleric','Paladin']), ('Sanctuary', 1, 'Abjuration', 'Creature protected; attackers must pass WIS save.', ARRAY['Cleric']),
-- Level 2 spells ('Spiritual Weapon',2, 'Evocation', 'Spectral weapon attacks as bonus action, 1d8 + mod.', ARRAY['Cleric']), ('Hold Person', 2, 'Enchantment', 'Humanoid paralyzed on failed WIS save.', ARRAY['Bard','Cleric','Druid','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Misty Step', 2, 'Conjuration', 'Bonus action. Teleport up to 30 ft.', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Scorching Ray', 2, 'Evocation', 'Three rays. Ranged spell attack each, 2d6 fire.', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Lesser Restoration', 2, 'Abjuration', 'End one disease or condition on a creature you touch.', ARRAY['Bard','Cleric','Druid','Paladin','Ranger']), ('Shatter', 2, 'Evocation', '3d8 thunder damage in 10-ft radius, CON save.', ARRAY['Bard','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Web', 2, 'Conjuration', 'Restrain creatures in 20-ft cube of webs.', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Invisibility', 2, 'Illusion', 'Creature becomes invisible for 1 hour.', ARRAY['Bard','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Darkness', 2, 'Evocation', 'Magical darkness in 15-ft radius.', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Mirror Image', 2, 'Illusion', 'Three illusory duplicates increase AC.', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']),
-- Level 3 spells ('Fireball', 3, 'Evocation', '20-ft radius. 8d6 fire damage, DEX save half.', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Counterspell', 3, 'Abjuration', 'Reaction. Automatically counter spell level 3 or lower.', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Revivify', 3, 'Necromancy', 'Creature that died within 1 minute returns with 1 HP.', ARRAY['Cleric','Paladin']), ('Spirit Guardians',3, 'Conjuration', 'Spirits deal 3d8 damage to enemies within 15 ft.', ARRAY['Cleric']), ('Dispel Magic', 3, 'Abjuration', 'End spells of 3rd level or lower on target.', ARRAY['Bard','Cleric','Druid','Paladin','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Lightning Bolt', 3, 'Evocation', '100-ft line. 8d6 lightning damage, DEX save half.', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Fly', 3, 'Transmutation', 'Target gains flying speed of 60 ft for 10 min.', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Haste', 3, 'Transmutation', 'Doubled speed, +2 AC, extra action. Concentration.', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']),
-- Level 4 spells ('Greater Invisibility', 4, 'Illusion', 'Target invisible even while attacking/casting.', ARRAY['Bard','Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Banishment', 4, 'Abjuration', 'CHA save or banished to another plane.', ARRAY['Cleric','Paladin','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Dimension Door', 4, 'Conjuration', 'Teleport up to 500 ft to a location you can see.', ARRAY['Bard','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']), ('Polymorph', 4, 'Transmutation', 'Transform creature into a beast.', ARRAY['Bard','Druid','Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Wall of Fire', 4, 'Evocation', 'Wall deals 5d8 fire damage to creatures within 10 ft.', ARRAY['Druid','Sorcerer','Wizard']),
-- Level 5 spells ('Mass Cure Wounds',5, 'Evocation', 'Up to 6 creatures regain 3d8 + mod HP.', ARRAY['Bard','Cleric','Druid']), ('Raise Dead', 5, 'Necromancy', 'Return a dead creature to life.', ARRAY['Bard','Cleric','Paladin']), ('Cone of Cold', 5, 'Evocation', '60-ft cone. 8d8 cold damage, CON save half.', ARRAY['Sorcerer','Wizard']), ('Hold Monster', 5, 'Enchantment', 'Creature paralyzed on failed WIS save.', ARRAY['Bard','Sorcerer','Warlock','Wizard']) ) AS v(name, lvl, school, description, classes) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells s WHERE s.name = v.name);
